chunks.content:
Article: News clipping
[]: News clipping             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Jul 02, 2006 11:26 am Besides from the funny title of Die Seele this article talks about the electric field of the soul (remember that the ATF is mentioned by a couple of sources as being a wall of electrons, plus how Shinji is negotiated back into human form by a series of electromagnets placed around the plug). The soul or ATF, according to some material I've looked through is really a field of fractal charge compression that creates boundaries (or differing levels of charge density) between our minds and others.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sun Jul 02, 2006 11:34 am yes that is what we are told in the seiries either p.s. die SEELE dieeeeeeee (germans are fun)

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sun Jul 02, 2006 12:22 pm I know it sounds like an empty academic point, SWA. What I'm thinking here though is that the evangelion community will have an actual model that can explain ATFs and AATFs and how they operate, how souls are transferable between vessels, that will be based in real-world findings and physics rather than supposition.
